title: croton elaeagni
intro: Croton elaeagni, also known as the Bastard Croton, is a plant species that belongs to the family Euphorbiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Croton elaeagni include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as providing relief from pain and inflammation. Croton elaeagni is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used in the form of a paste or poultice for topical application.
